name: Pyre-Gro
desc_clean: Awoken 0 The Sentient once told me that the Wildwood was created when Pyre shards were scattered throughout the soil, fertilizing it with an otherworldly energy.
mechanic_summary: Pyre-Gro to Spell klanu Awoken. Awoken 0 The Sentient once told me that the Wildwood was created when Pyre shards were scattered throughout the soil, fertilizing it with an otherworldly energy. Keywords: brak.
wiki_desc: Awoken 0 The Sentient once told me that the Wildwood was created when Pyre shards were scattered throughout the soil, fertilizing it with an otherworldly energy. Repeating that process now has a similar, though reduced, effect.
